title: 信息日报 2026-06-27

headline.title: OpenAI预览GPT-5.6 Sol：新一代模型亮相
headline.summary: OpenAI预览GPT-5.6 Sol，一款在编程、科学和网络安全方面能力更强的新型模型，并配备了其最先进的安全栈。
headline.title_en: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
headline.summary_en: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
headline.original_title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
headline.reason: OpenAI发布下一代模型，标志着AI能力新高度，同时伴随政府监管新动向，影响深远。
headline.reason_en: OpenAI's release of a next-generation model marks a new height in AI capability, accompanied by emerging government oversight, making it the day's most impactful story.
